semantic.role: Public API barrel file for the configuration subsystem, re-exporting the facade and type definitions.
responsibilities: Aggregates and re-exports the public Config facade from './config/facade.js'.
Re-exports all type definitions from './config/types.js' to provide a unified import path.
Serves as the primary entry point for consumers of the configuration infrastructure.
outOfScope: Providing runtime orchestration or service layer concerns.
Directly importing or depending on deep private implementation modules.
invariants: Must only re-export public symbols from the config subsystem.
Must not contain any executable logic or stateful behavior.
Must maintain a stable export surface for external consumers.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, unified public interface for the configuration subsystem, encapsulating internal structure and facilitating refactoring.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the git intent 'tighten schema handling and add try preview' does not directly affect this barrel export.
